docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF RE: RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF MACMURRAY PACIFIC
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-13-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF APR-15-2016 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK L. FONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,880.52 FILED BY MACMURRAY PACIFIC AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, RICK DBA RICK'S CUSTOM FINISH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-15-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
